title: 翻页动画
completionRule: Complete only when every legacy control, option, default, persistence rule, directional animation, Card-shell behavior, reduced-motion contract, stable image identity, scripted 1920x1080 visual evidence, lifecycle cleanup and performance budget has automated evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 启用、条件内容与全部重置
acceptanceItems: 启用翻页动画 checkbox 默认关闭
启用开关与重置按钮位于同一标题行
RotateCcw 图标按钮 title 为重置设置
关闭时不挂载类型、时长、缓动和预览区域
重置一次恢复 enabled=false、type=none、duration=0、easing=easeOutQuad
设置尚未加载时显示居中的加载中状态

sourceUiInventory.title: 动画类型选项、顺序与方向语义
acceptanceItems: 类型 select 为全宽紧凑控件
none / 无动画
fade / 淡入淡出
slide / 水平滑动
slideUp / 垂直滑动
zoom / 缩放
flip / 翻转
类型顺序固定为 none、fade、slide、slideUp、zoom、flip
next 与 prev 对 slide 使用相反 X 方向
next 与 prev 对 slideUp 使用相反 Y 方向
next 与 prev 对 zoom 使用 0.9 与 1.1 起始比例
next 与 prev 对 flip 使用 -15deg 与 15deg 起始角
fade 对两个方向使用相同透明度语义
none 或 disabled 时不生成动画 class

sourceUiInventory.title: 时长滑杆、缓动选项与 CSS 映射
acceptanceItems: 时长 range 最小 0ms、最大 500ms、步长 10ms
时长标题行右侧实时显示当前毫秒值
滑杆下方显示 0ms 与 500ms 边界标签
store 对外部时长仍限制为 0..1000ms
linear 映射 linear
ease 映射 ease
easeIn 映射 ease-in
easeOut 映射 ease-out
easeInOut 映射 ease-in-out
easeOutQuad 映射 cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)
easeOutCubic 映射 cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1)
缓动 select 顺序固定为 linear、ease、easeIn、easeOut、easeInOut、easeOutQuad、easeOutCubic
默认缓动为 easeOutQuad

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 内悬停预览
acceptanceItems: 预览区位于分隔线上方标题之后
预览容器高度 64px 且裁剪溢出
预览盒显示当前动画类型中文名称
预览盒使用当前 duration 与 easing CSS
悬停时 scale(0.95) 且 opacity=0.7
预览不翻页、不请求图片且不改 Reader session

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧 localStorage 与目标 TOML 持久化
acceptanceItems: 旧 localStorage key 为 neoview-page-transition-settings
旧 JSON 读取后以默认值补齐缺失字段
旧 JSON 解析失败时回退完整默认值
旧实现每次 setEnabled/setType/setDuration/setEasing 立即写 localStorage
旧写入失败只记录错误且保留内存设置
XR 一次性导入旧 key 后只写 [nodes.neoview.image.page_transition]
目标 TOML 使用 snake_case 严格字段
目标 PATCH 串行、原子、失败回滚且保留未知未来字段
滑杆移动仅本地预览，交互结束至多一次 PATCH
reset 使用独占命令并一次写回全部规范默认值

sourceUiInventory.title: 帧变更检测、动画生命周期与稳定 DOM
acceptanceItems: 首次渲染不触发动画
无有效页索引不触发动画
页索引未变化不触发动画
页索引增大判定 next、减小判定 prev
动画先应用 enter 起点再于下一帧激活终点
过渡只作用于 transform 与 opacity
新动画开始前清除旧 cleanup timer
duration+50ms 后移除动画 class 与 inline transition
组件销毁时清理 timer 与 store subscription
动画只包装稳定 ReaderFrame/PageImage，不更换 img 节点或 asset URL
快速连续翻页由单一有界动画状态合并，不累积 DOM 或 timer
prefers-reduced-motion 时目标实现强制无动画且不改用户保存值

sourceUiInventory.title: Card registry、共享外壳、视觉和可访问性
acceptanceItems: Card ID 为 pageTransition
标题为翻页动画
默认 control Panel 且 canHide=true
CardRenderer 动态导入并缓存组件
共享 Card 外壳负责显隐、折叠、排序与高度
Card 隐藏、折叠或窗口关闭时内容、订阅和 timer 不挂载
所有 checkbox、select、range 和 reset 命令具有可访问名称
原生键盘可切换、选择和调整滑杆
1920x1080 常见 Reader 侧栏内无横向溢出
脚本截图同时记录旧版与目标展开态

items.title: 启用并条件挂载翻页动画设置
items.targetContract: The Card preserves the legacy disabled default and only mounts type, duration, easing and preview controls while enabled.
items.notes: CLI and GUI controls are complete; TUI controls remain pending.

items.title: 六种旧版动画类型
items.targetContract: The shared enum preserves none, fade, slide, slideUp, zoom and flip IDs, labels and order.
items.notes: All six IDs, labels and order are shared; CLI selection is complete and TUI remains pending.

items.title: 0..500ms 时长控制
items.targetContract: The GUI exposes 0..500ms in 10ms steps while the shared imported-value codec remains bounded.
items.notes: The GUI uses 0..500ms/10ms; CLI uses the same 0..500ms boundary and TUI remains pending.

items.title: 七种旧版缓动
items.targetContract: The shared enum and CSS projection preserve all seven easing IDs, labels, order and cubic-bezier values.
items.notes: All seven IDs and exact CSS values are shared; CLI selection is complete and TUI remains pending.

items.title: Card 内无副作用预览
items.targetContract: Hover preview uses current duration/easing and never navigates, requests media or changes Reader session.
items.notes: The preview is local-only and covered by unit and scripted visual evidence.

items.title: 按页索引识别前后方向
items.targetContract: Frame changes derive next/prev from physical page movement and project the exact legacy directional transform origins.
items.notes: Shared projection and the stable React layer cover both directions.

items.title: 稳定帧容器 CSS 动画
items.targetContract: One stable frame wrapper animates only transform and opacity, skips initial/unchanged frames and bounds rapid navigation cleanup.
items.notes: The runtime owns one stable wrapper and one cleanup timer.

items.title: 尊重减少动态效果
items.targetContract: XR intentionally suppresses runtime animation under prefers-reduced-motion without rewriting the persisted preference.
items.notes: Runtime suppression leaves the persisted enabled preference unchanged.

items.title: 一次恢复全部默认值
items.targetContract: One explicit reset restores all four defaults and commits exactly one canonical mutation.
items.notes: GUI and CLI reset are one aggregate mutation; TUI remains pending.

items.title: 旧 localStorage 一次导入并写入唯一 TOML
items.targetContract: Import neoview-page-transition-settings once and persist only [nodes.neoview.image.page_transition] through strict serialized atomic PATCH with rollback.
items.notes: Legacy localStorage imports once into canonical TOML; CLI persistence is complete and TUI remains pending.

items.title: 严格有界共享设置 DTO
items.targetContract: One browser-safe DTO validates booleans, exact enums and bounded duration for GUI, CLI and TUI.
items.notes: Domain, HTTP, GUI and CLI share one strict DTO; TUI exposure remains pending.

items.title: 加载、条件、提交、错误与回滚状态
items.targetContract: The Card covers lazy loading, disabled conditional content, preview, pending write, rollback, reset and disposal without stale state.
items.notes: Conditional, stale hydration and rollback behavior are covered; explicit retry UI remains pending.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与延迟加载
items.targetContract: pageTransition retains its title, control Panel default, hideability and independent deferred Card chunk.
items.notes: Registry, shared Card shell and independent lazy chunk are covered.

items.title: 旧版控件层级、标签、密度与 1920x1080 几何
items.targetContract: The target preserves compact ordering, Chinese labels, conditional hierarchy and preview geometry, characterized by scripted legacy and target 1920x1080 screenshots.
items.notes: Legacy and target 1920x1080 scripted screenshots characterize the compact hierarchy.

items.title: 命名控件、原生键盘与焦点语义
items.targetContract: Every checkbox, select, range and icon command has an accessible name and native keyboard behavior with visible focus.
items.notes: Native controls and explicit icon labels preserve keyboard and focus semantics.

items.title: timer、订阅和动画状态释放
items.targetContract: Rapid navigation owns at most one cleanup timer and hidden/collapsed/unmounted surfaces release every subscription and transient animation state.
items.notes: Unmount and rapid navigation clear the single owned timer and transient styles.

items.title: 动画保持活动图片与资源身份
items.targetContract: Configuration and runtime transitions never remount the active img, change its asset URL or create another decode path.
items.notes: Exact img identity and URL are covered during configuration; a real asset-route request counter remains pending.

items.title: 合成动画、O(1) 状态与 chunk 预算
items.targetContract: Animations use compositor-friendly transform/opacity, bounded O(1) state and one timer; Card/domain remain deferred and navigation stays within existing gates.
items.notes: O(1) runtime and 3.7/2.0/5.7 KiB deferred chunks are proven; unified navigation and CLI/TUI timings remain pending.

items.title: 记录存储、提交和减少动态效果改进
items.targetContract: Document localStorage-to-TOML migration, slider end-only persistence, failure rollback and reduced-motion suppression while preserving legacy type/easing math and control hierarchy.
items.notes: XR replaces localStorage with TOML, end-only slider writes and reduced-motion suppression; CLI uses the same strict persistence contract and TUI remains pending.
